description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test. Add three build jobs named build:gcc6, build:gcc7, build:gcc8, each using the gcc:6, gcc:7, gcc:8 Docker images respectively, running the command make FC=gfortran, and publishing any *.exe files as artifacts. Add three test jobs named test:gcc6, test:gcc7, test:gcc8, each depending on the matching build job, using the same gcc image, and executing ./test.exe in the test stage. No caches, services, variables, or special rules are required.
